glossary.subject: FE Requested for Postponing  for {{mappings.orderType}} with order no: {{mappings.orderNumber}} and Change Ticket {{mappings.ticketNumber}} for device {{mappings.deviceName}} at site {{mappings.siteId}}.
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

For {{mappings.orderType}} order with order number {{mappings.orderNumber}} and Change Ticket {{mappings.ticketNumber}} for device {{mappings.deviceName}} at site {{mappings.siteId}}, FE Requested for Postponing and re-scheduling required.

Order no: {{mappings.orderNumber}}
Site id: {{mappings.siteId}}

Please check the {{ mappings.url }} with the order number for more information.

Thank You
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
